testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.platform.buffer.WriteAheadLogTest

testcase.name: entries survive across WAL instances (restart simulation)()
compact removes acked entries from WAL file()
eviction keeps only most recent entries when maxRows exceeded()
compact on empty WAL does not throw()
acked entry is removed from unackedEntries()
acking one entry does not remove others()

testsuite.system-out: 09:46:07.973 [Test worker] DEBUG io.slogr.agent.platform.buffer.WriteAheadLog -- WAL compacted: 1 entries remaining 09:46:07.996 [Test worker] DEBUG io.slogr.agent.platform.buffer.WriteAheadLog -- WAL compacted: 1 entries remaining 09:46:08.028 [Test worker] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.buffer.WriteAheadLog -- WAL evicted 1 oldest entries (limit=5) 09:46:08.032 [Test worker] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.buffer.WriteAheadLog -- WAL evicted 1 oldest entries (limit=5) 09:46:08.038 [Test worker] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.buffer.WriteAheadLog -- WAL evicted 1 oldest entries (limit=5) 09:46:08.042 [Test worker] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.buffer.WriteAheadLog -- WAL evicted 1 oldest entries (limit=5) 09:46:08.045 [Test worker] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.buffer.WriteAheadLog -- WAL evicted 1 oldest entries (limit=5)
